global_description: A small, compact songbird with a rounded body and short tail. It features a vibrant yellow throat and chest, contrasting with olive-green upperparts and white underparts. The wings and tail are dark with two white wing bars, and the face has a distinctive yellow spectacle pattern.
discriminative_attributes: Dark wings with two white wing bars

part_details.throat: Bright yellow, extending to the chest.
part_details.wings: Dark with two distinct white bars.

spatial_relations: The yellow throat transitions into the olive-green upperparts.
The white underparts are below the yellow chest.
The wings are positioned on either side of the body with white bars.
